rows.label: tev000392_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0002
rows.name:
I was just trying to drill some
combat skills into Shingo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0003
rows.name:
We Pathfinder might not be a combat-first
kind of outfit, but it's not like the Growth
and the indigens just leave us alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0004
rows.name:
And when we do run into trouble, I'd like him
to be able to defend himself without having
to rely on Saiden or Mondo all the time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0005
rows.name:
Shingo's a pretty fast learner—he
just lacks experience.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0006
rows.name:
How would you train him
if he was one of yours?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_JNK0010
rows.name: Strictly

rows.label: tev000392_SEL0011
rows.name:
Suggest a brutal regimen
with no room for failure.

rows.label: tev000392_JNK0020
rows.name: Supportively

rows.label: tev000392_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say you'd guide him with
positive reinforcement.

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0007
rows.name: Heh. Great minds think alike, eh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0008
rows.name:
Way I see it, if he runs into an enemy
outside the city, I won't be able to
hold his hand through the fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0009
rows.name:
So I've gotta drill everything I
learned out there into him before
something happens to one of us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0010
rows.name:
And there's a lot to learn. Not just
stuff I've figured out here on Mira,
but lessons from back on Earth as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0011
rows.name:
All I ask is for him to be able to survive
whatever crazy thing happens next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0012
rows.name:
Ultimately, if me or Saiden go
down, I want to know that Shingo
is still able to go on without us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hmm. So that's really
how you train people?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0014
rows.name:
I suppose I'd better positively
reinforce the crap out of him, then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0015
rows.name:
I mean, he's going to be my teammate
as well as my student, right? Probably
best I don't break the poor kid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0016
rows.name:
But what happens if Shingo gets separated
from the team? Or god forbid, is the only
survivor of an attack? What then?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0017
rows.name:
The things he doesn't know are the
very things that'll get him killed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0018
rows.name:
A rifle can't shoot for crap if it's not
loaded with the correct ammo, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0019
rows.name:
The indigens on this planet aren't gonna give him a
chance to learn from his mistakes. I need him to be
able to walk away from whatever happens to him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Anyway, sorry if I got a
little carried away there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0021
rows.name:
I should go, though. I gotta run Shingo
through a Doll training session.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000392_MSG0022
rows.name: See ya around.[ST:wait ]
